title: A Study on Advances in Creating 3D Holographic Images and Optical Applications of Holography
author: Granmayeh Rad, Adeleh
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Nowadays, the most beautiful 3D pictures and movies are created by means of holograms. The most advantage of this technique is the possibility to observe 3D images without using glasses. The quality of created images by this method has surprised everyone. In this paper, the experimental steps of making a transmission hologram have been mentioned. In what follows, current advances of this science–art will be discussed. In another section of this paper the optical application of holography has been reviewed. Finally, the predictions for the future of holography have also been studied.
